title: Harry W. Colmery Veterans Educational Assistance Act of 2017 (Forever GI Bill)
fullText:
Harry W. Colmery Veterans Educational Assistance Act of 2017 (Public Law 115-48).
An Act to amend title 38, United States Code, to make certain improvements in the laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs, and for other purposes.

Amended 38 U.S.C. § 3103 to update training program rules, specifically adding references to newer active duty mobilization codes under Title 10 for eligibility extensions, and eliminating the 15-year delimiting date for Post-9/11 GI Bill (which indirectly changed Chapter 31 administrative reviews).
plainEnglish: Removed the 15-year expiration date on the Post-9/11 GI Bill for veterans discharged after January 1, 2013, which prompted the VA to also update its Chapter 31 eligibility evaluation rules.
veteranUse: Use this to show the legislative trend of expanding education benefits and removing arbitrary expiration dates.
